channel.title: Posts on Handgull's portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Handgull's portfolio

item.title: Attention please!
item.description: Why there aren’t english posts? I don’t want to write two times every post i make, and i have choosen to write them in italian because: I am more fluent in it 🙈 I notice the lack of good italian content Click here to check my posts
